description: The usa.gdt dataset is open in Gretl, containing real US quarterly macroeconomic data from the Federal Reserve FRED database (1984Q1 to 2009Q3) with variables 'gdp' (real GDP in billions of chained 2005 dollars) and 'inf' (CPI inflation rate, annualized %). Create a time series plot of the 'gdp' variable showing how real GDP has changed over time from 1984Q1 to 2009Q3. Save the resulting graph as a PNG file to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/gdp_time_series.png.

metadata.data_source: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis FRED database, via Hill et al. POE5
